text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Cough! Hack!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, quit making a scene over everything. It was
just a little cough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, about my training...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's getting old. I can practically go through the
whole menu on muscle memory alone.
choice_data_list: Hmm, you do have a point...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If our goal is to win the Kikuka Sho, then she'll
have to really level up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Speee! Let's do some sprints on the beach
together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Tickezo! You scared me! Um, are you sure you
want to run with me?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Super sure!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: If we train together, we can draw out each other's strength to the max, and I'll be able to run faster than everrr!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's do this! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that makes so much sense, Tickezo! Okay, I'm
on board! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, that overflowing enthusiasm makes me sick.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But... I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin goes silent after that. I think I know
what she's trying to say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure training with someone would help break
the monotony she's feeling.
choice_data_list:
Want me to look for someone you can train
with?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Like you'd be able to find anyone.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You saw what Ticket was getting up to, and
Hayahide said she wanted to train on her own this
summer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't come crying to me if people scoff at you
when you ask them to train with a pipsqueak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only did Narita Taishin do great at the
Satsuki Sho and Japanese Derby, she's one of the
top three racers running the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how there's no one in Tracen Academy
who doubts her skills.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do whatever you want...
choice_data_list: Okay, then I'll go find someone!
Okay, then I'll go find someone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, I run around the beach, trying to find a
potential training partner or two for Narita
Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you want us to do strength training by
whacking watermelons? Don't tell me we have to
do this with our bare hands, haha.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Of course not! We can use a bat!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, that sounds a whole lot like a regular ol'
summertime game than actual training.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, Rice, you're awesome! You brought so
many tires!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I pulled a whole bunch over because,
well, I want to work on being more gutsy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Okay, which one to pick...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Watermelon-splitting? How exactly is that
train—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, Taishin! I'll start us off, so I'm counting
on you to guide me while I'm blindfolded!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm the guide?! Talk about getting thrown into the deep end...
choice_data_list:
Just pretend you're controlling a character in a
video game!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Who asked you?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: There! The blindfold's on, so let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Urk!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Take two steps to the right! Then three steps
forward... No, that's too far! Backtrack a step and
a half!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And then... ATTACK!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Taishin! Your instructions
were really easy to follow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... Sure thing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Nature's prepped the watermelon over there
for us to eat. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Geez, the watermelon's bashed to smithereens...
Wouldn't it have been better just to cut it
normally?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, strange, isn't it? The watermelon's a little
wonky-looking, but it tastes better than normal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin ends up having a relatively nice
summer.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-are you sure you want to join us, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I might end up c-cursing you with bad luck... if we
train together...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What kind of logic is that? Anyway, I'm the one
asking if I can train with you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So, I guess... Could I?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! S-sure! We'd love to have you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The training goes well, and Narita Taishin reaps
the benefits.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, lookie! They're selling shaved ice! We trained
hard, so let's reward ourselves with dessert!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, shaved ice! I wonder if they have apple
flavor?
choice_data_list: Hang tight! I'll buy some for the three of you!
Hang tight! I'll buy some for the three of you!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Ah, shucks. I'm sorry! Business was booming
today, and I'm plum out of ice! I'm waiting on a
new delivery to come now.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Oops, it's the phone. Hello? What?! You're really
close, but there's been an accident?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Not good! Everyone's waiting for the
ice—we'd better go help!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wait... Are you serious?!

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text:
Dang it, I can't believe I ran off into the
shoulder...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, gosh... Wh-what do we do? If only I hadn't
wanted shaved ice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okie-dokie! All we've gotta do is pick up your
truck, right? We can do it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! Um, w-we've got this!

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text:
What?! This thing's loaded with cargo! I know
you're all Umamusume, but still...

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text:
You're all so petite! I can't be asking you to pick
up a truck.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Out of our way. Urara, Rice—let's do this.

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text: What?! Wait, you'll hurt yourse—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hup... YAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to their combined efforts, they manage to
get some well-earned shaved ice.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You were so cool, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! You were so cool... and bold!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's gotten into you two?
